claim: ORIUS is presented as a fundamental runtime safety layer for Physical AI under degraded observation.
later_trim_or_rewrite_action: Keep as the anchor claim in both manuscripts.

claim: ORIUS supplies one reusable runtime grammar for degraded observation, repair, fallback, and certificates across six domains.
later_trim_or_rewrite_action: Keep the claim architectural, not equal-domain empirical.

claim: OASG is the common hidden hazard across batteries, AV, industrial plants, healthcare monitoring, navigation, and aerospace.
later_trim_or_rewrite_action: Keep the hazard universal and plant-agnostic.

claim: Prior conformal, runtime assurance, safe-control, and CPS-monitoring families are each insufficient because none alone closes degraded observation as an action-semantics problem.
later_trim_or_rewrite_action: Trim only if a future venue demands a more conservative related-work posture.

claim: The Detect--Calibrate--Constrain--Shield--Certify kernel is the dominant technical move of ORIUS.
later_trim_or_rewrite_action: Retain as the main technical architecture claim.

claim: One universal benchmark schema and one governance surface are sufficient to compare defended rows across domains.
later_trim_or_rewrite_action: Keep the claim bounded to defended rows and audited support surfaces.

claim: The theory bridge establishes that degraded observation can create true-state violations despite observed-state legality, and that repair is structurally necessary.
later_trim_or_rewrite_action: Keep theorem statements scoped to the documented assumptions.

claim: Battery provides witness-depth theorem-to-code-to-artifact closure and calibrates the rest of the framework.
later_trim_or_rewrite_action: Keep battery as witness rather than narrative center.

claim: Autonomous vehicles are a defended bounded row under the TTC plus predictive-entry-barrier contract.
later_trim_or_rewrite_action: Do not expand this to full-stack or multi-lane autonomy claims.

claim: Industrial control is a defended bounded row with explicit envelope-preserving repair and fallback semantics.
later_trim_or_rewrite_action: Keep deployment language bounded to the defended replay surface.

claim: Healthcare monitoring is a defended bounded row that treats degraded observation as intervention-suppression risk.
later_trim_or_rewrite_action: Keep the row bounded to monitoring/intervention semantics rather than bedside certification.

claim: Navigation is written as a future defended row in the visionary flagship draft.
later_trim_or_rewrite_action: Trim to explicit gated language if submission must become artifact-strict.

claim: Aerospace is written as a future defended row in the visionary flagship draft.
later_trim_or_rewrite_action: Trim to explicit experimental-row language if submission must become artifact-strict.

claim: ORIUS is the first universal runtime safety layer for Physical AI with one shared evaluation and governance contract.
later_trim_or_rewrite_action: Keep equal-domain parity as a target, not a present-tense fact, unless blocked rows close.

claim: Equal-domain universality remains a target state until navigation and aerospace clear the governed parity gate.
ORIUS changes the field by establishing runtime safety layers, rather than nominal controllers, as the right universal object for Physical AI safety.
later_trim_or_rewrite_action: Retain the field-shaping tone while keeping the evidence gate explicit.
